name: Merge K Sorted Lists
description: Given an array of k linked lists, each sorted in ascending order, merge all into one sorted linked list and return it. Use a min-heap or divide-and-conquer.
constraints: k == lists.length. 0 <= k <= 10^4. 0 <= lists[i].length <= 500. -10^4 <= lists[i][j] <= 10^4. Each list is sorted in ascending order. Sum of all lists[i].length <= 10^4.
